key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to poll the Claude API for usage data. Minimum 60 seconds.

key.name: color-critical
key.description: Color for usage at or above 90%.

key.name: color-text
key.description: Color for label text in the dropdown.

key.name: color-background
key.description: Background color for the dropdown panel.

key.name: notify-threshold
key.description: Show a notification when usage exceeds this percentage.

key.name: show-extra-usage
key.description: Display the extra usage / cost section in the dropdown.

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Deprecated: use indicator-style='compact' instead. Kept for backward compat.

key.name: indicator-style
key.summary: Indicator display style in the top bar

key.name: session-indicator-enabled
key.description: Whether to show the 5-hour session usage indicator in the top bar.

key.name: session-indicator-style
key.description: Display style for the session indicator. Options: 'percentage', 'progress-bar', 'circle', 'compact'.

key.name: session-show-time
key.description: Display remaining time label beside the session indicator.

key.name: week-indicator-enabled
key.description: Whether to show the 7-day weekly usage indicator in the top bar.

key.name: week-indicator-style
key.description: Display style for the weekly indicator. Options: 'percentage', 'progress-bar', 'circle', 'compact'.

key.name: week-show-time
key.description: Display remaining time label beside the weekly indicator.

key.name: show-time-marker
key.summary: Show time marker on progress bars
key.description: Draw a vertical tick on progress-bar style indicators showing elapsed time within the window.
